overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a dawn walk through Night City's urban core. The player moves from a neon-lit commercial sidewalk across a busy intersection, then under an elevated highway into a restricted back alley where hostile NPCs are encountered.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk between futuristic glass towers, approaching an intersection

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate signage with red and blue neon lettering
massive curved screen displaying a woman's face in warm golden light
tall reflective building with multiple illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city sidewalk at dawn, with warm sunlight mixing with cool neon signage. The WNS News building dominates the right side while a massive digital billboard glows on the left. The player walks forward through sparse pedestrian traffic toward an upcoming intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with yellow crosswalk markings

events.description: silver sedan and black van pass through the intersection while pedestrian crosses

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the yellow-striped crosswalk and traversing the multi-lane street

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving through the intersection, headlights on

entered.detail: illuminated yellow signage for 'MASALA STUDIOS' on a dark building facade
massive concrete and steel structure spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the wide urban intersection, moving from the commercial sidewalk into the street. Vehicles pass by as the camera approaches the elevated highway overpass. The Masala Studios sign becomes prominent on the left while the initial billboard recedes into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beneath elevated highway with neon advertising

events.description: approaching and entering a restricted alleyway marked with 'NO ENTRY' signage

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk under the shadow of the overpass, passing pedestrians and parked vehicles

entered.detail: tall structure with multiple glowing digital advertisements and holographic displays
metal security gate with yellow 'NO ENTRY' warning signs and concrete barriers

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive elevated highway, the environment becomes darker and more enclosed. Neon signs and digital billboards provide most of the illumination. The player approaches a restricted area marked by a metal gate with 'NO ENTRY' warnings, transitioning from the public street toward a darker alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: restricted industrial back alley with dumpsters and cargo

events.description: passing through the metal gate into the dimly lit alley with blue and red emergency lighting

agents.ego_description: cautiously entering the dark alleyway and approaching two hostile-looking individuals

notable_agents.action: tattooed character with cybernetic implants holding a melee weapon, turning to face the player
second character leaning against industrial equipment, observing the player

entered.detail: partially open corrugated metal security gate with red and white warning stripes
large blue metal waste container with graffiti and warning labels
stacked shipping containers and cardboard boxes near the alley entrance

segments.scene_description: The player enters a dark, restricted alleyway through a metal gate, leaving the city street behind. The environment shifts to industrial tones with blue and red neon lighting. Two hostile NPCs are encountered—one with visible cybernetic implants and a weapon, creating tension as the segment ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, neon-lit commercial district into a dark and hostile industrial alleyway. It begins on a futuristic sidewalk at dawn, where warm sunlight blends with cool neon signage beneath the towering WNS News building and a massive digital billboard. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens up to cross a wide urban intersection filled with passing vehicles, shifting focus toward the Masala Studios sign as the initial city lights recede. The environment then becomes darker and more enclosed as the camera passes beneath a massive elevated highway, transitioning from the public street toward a restricted area marked by metal gates and no-entry warnings. Finally, the shot enters a dim alleyway dominated by industrial tones and blue and red neon lighting, where the atmosphere turns tense upon encountering two armed, cybernetically enhanced hostiles.
